opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The oil exploded in my face, my clothes caught fire, and my chest feels incredibly tight when I breathe.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: There was an accident in the kitchen about fifteen minutes ago — hot oil and a flash fire — and he's badly burned, his voice has gone hoarse and he's struggling to breathe. (Reported with his spouse on the line.)

symptom_narrative.onset: about 15 minutes ago, right after a flash fire and a boiling-oil spill in a confined kitchen
symptom_narrative.character: burning and stinging in the blistered areas, but he says he can't feel anything at all over the black, hard patches on his chest; his throat feels tight and burning and his voice has gone hoarse
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: he says the pain in the blistered areas is terrible, and his wife says he looks like he's collapsing
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: face, chest and both arms; his front and forearms are the worst
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and getting worse since the fire
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: the swelling and the tight-throat feeling keep getting worse on their own
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feels incredibly dizzy and cold, is shivering, and his face and body are visibly puffing up
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: was completely well and independent before this; now he can barely stay upright

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: accident happened at home in the kitchen; spouse is present, has secured the scene and made the call

objective_data_offered.value: spouse reports the skin over the middle of his chest looks white, leathery and charred black, with blistered raw areas on his arms and face
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: described by a distressed bystander, not examined by a clinician

objective_data_offered.value: spouse reports his face, lips and body are visibly swelling up quickly
spouse reports his voice is hoarse and his breathing is noisy and harsh, and the hair on his face looks singed
patient says he can feel severe pain in the blistered areas but no pain at all over the charred patches on his chest
patient says he feels freezing cold, dizzy and is shivering hard; spouse says he is pale and sweaty

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-stated weight, useful for the hospital's fluid calculations

objective_data_offered.value: kitchen is fire-damaged with lingering smoke; the scene has been secured by the spouse
